display_name.description: The name displayed for the Azure AD group; must be unique within the tenant.

include_transitive_members.description: Specifies whether to include transitive group members in the group membership retrieval.

mail_enabled.description: Indicates whether the group is mail-enabled, requiring the group to be a Microsoft 365 group.

mail_nickname.description: Specifies the mail nickname for the group, used as the email alias. Must be unique within the Azure Active Directory tenant.

object_id.description: Unique identifier of the Azure AD group, used to reference the group in other resources or operations.

security_enabled.description: Indicates whether the group is a security-enabled group, which can be used to assign permissions to resources in Azure AD.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration settings for create, read, update, and delete operations for the Azure AD group, allowing customization of operation timeout periods.
